heading: Interim slot rules at New York airports
label: 41716 Interim slot rules at New York airports

children.heading: .—Exemptions for Air Service to Small and Nonhub Airports
children.label: a .—Exemptions for Air Service to Small and Nonhub Airports

children.text: if the air carrier was not providing such air transportation during the week of ;November 1, 1999

if the number of flights to be provided between such airports by the air carrier during any week will exceed the number of flights provided by the air carrier between such airports during the week of ; orNovember 1, 1999

if the air transportation to be provided under the exemption will be provided with a regional jet as replacement of turboprop air transportation that was being provided during the week of .November 1, 1999

children.heading: .—Exemptions for New Entrant and Limited Incumbent Air Carriers
children.label: b .—Exemptions for New Entrant and Limited Incumbent Air Carriers
children.text: Subject to section 41714(i), the Secretary shall grant, by order, exemptions from the requirements under subparts K and S of part 93 of title 14, Code of Federal Regulations (pertaining to slots at high density airports), to any new entrant air carrier or limited incumbent air carrier to provide air transportation to or from LaGuardia Airport or John F. Kennedy International Airport if the number of slot exemptions granted under this subsection to such air carrier with respect to such airport when added to the slots and slot exemptions held by such air carrier with respect to such airport does not exceed 20; except that the Secretary may grant not to exceed 4 additional slot exemptions at LaGuardia Airport to an incumbent air carrier operating at least 20 but not more than 28 slots at such airport as of , to provide air transportation between LaGuardia Airport and a small hub airport or nonhub airport.October 1, 2004

children.heading: 3.—StageAircraft Required
children.label: c 3.—StageAircraft Required
children.text: An exemption may not be granted under this section with respect to any aircraft that is not a Stage 3 aircraft (as defined by the Secretary).

children.heading: .—Preservation of Certain Existing Slot-Related Air Service
children.label: d .—Preservation of Certain Existing Slot-Related Air Service

children.text: before , the Secretary received a written air service termination notice for that route; orOctober 1, 1999

after , the air carrier submits an air service termination notice under section 41719 for that route and the Secretary determines that the carrier suffered excessive losses, including substantial losses on operations on that route during any three quarters of the year immediately preceding the date of submission of the notice.September 30, 1999
